channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: US conducts 'self-defense' strikes, Rubio says Strait will reopen
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: New York reaches NBA Finals for first time since 1999 after sweeping Cleveland
item.description: The Knicks defeated the Cavaliers to sweep the Eastern Conference finals.

item.title: WATCH: Top winners at Britain's annual cheese-rolling competition
item.description: ABC News' Danny New reports on the event in England, won by a German YouTuber and a woman dressed as a mouse.

item.title: Trump to undergo annual physical; public disclosure is his choice
item.description: President Donald Trump is scheduled for a medical exam on Tuesday, renewing public focus on his health.
